## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/build
- [ ] Docker/deployment

## Verification

List the commands you ran. Do not include secrets or private library data.

## Security and Data Safety

- [ ] No real credentials, cookies, tokens, private logs, or music-library contents are included.
- [ ] Destructive operations were tested only against temporary or fake data.
- [ ] Any new external calls, file writes, subprocesses, or destructive workflows are documented.
